summary: Taiki has pivoted from a successful bearish shorting campaign to explicitly calling a market bottom and anticipating higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After months of profiting from Ethereum shorts, his latest analysis suggests the correction is over and identifies catalysts like STRC to propel BTC upward. He challenges standard 4-year cycle theories to argue that a bottom is currently forming, signaling it is time to look for long opportunities rather than shorts.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
